title: allantodia axillaris
intro: Allantodia axillaris, also known as the Axillaris fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Blechnaceae family. It is native to Southeast Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Allantodia axillaris include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The herbal preparations of Allantodia axillaris include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or extracting the plant's active compounds using a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
